sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66105" key="melitourgi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελῐτουργ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελῐτουργ-ός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, dub. ll. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μελιττουργία, -γός</foreign>.</entryFree>
